calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Deliver Trust
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Aya Ananda appearing via zoom for David Terry and Denson Terry (petitioner).
Joan Terry (Pro per) appearing in person (trustee).

Discussion was held as to obtaining a copy of the trust. Petition for order to deliver trust is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Mrs. Terry to is given two weeks to deliver a copy of the trust to the petitioners.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.
